# Incursa Integrations Cloudflare

Independent Cloudflare integration repository for Incursa applications.

Primary solution: `Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.slnx`.

## Capabilities

- Cloudflare R2 object storage helpers
- Cloudflare KV helpers
- SSL for SaaS custom hostname onboarding/sync services
- Cloudflare load-balancer monitor/pool/load-balancer clients

## Commands

- Restore: `dotnet restore Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.slnx`
- Build: `dotnet build Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.slnx -c Release`
- Test: `dotnet test --solution Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare.slnx -c Release`
- Pack: `pwsh -File scripts/pack.ps1`

## Scope Governance

Boundary policy: `docs/quality/repo-scope-boundary.md`.
